unresolved.title: Docs still mention stale endpoints
details: README.md and central-hub/README.md still reference /api/status and /api/sunpanel/sync as primary entry points.
docs/FUNCTION_CHECK_REPORT.md and docs/central-hub-architecture.md also list older routes like /api/ip and /api/sunpanel/cards that are not wired in server.mjs.
unresolved.impact: Can mislead operators reading the docs, but does not block runtime startup or tests.

unresolved.title: Migration docs are partially outdated
details: docs/MIGRATION_GUIDE.md and docs/migration/*.md still show legacy checks and examples for routes that have been simplified or removed.
These files should be refreshed together in a doc-only pass.
unresolved.impact: No code breakage; documentation drift only.
